install.windows_download: Global / unblocked networks only: open https://claude.com/download to get the official installer (.exe). Default save location: %USERPROFILE%\Downloads. In mainland China this page is effectively always blocked — use the winget path instead.
install.macos_download: Global / unblocked networks only: open https://claude.com/download to get the official installer (.dmg). Default save location: ~/Downloads.
install.linux: Not supported. Claude Desktop is Windows / macOS only.
install.note: GUI desktop app — installation finishes through a graphical wizard. On Windows, winget is the PREFERRED PRIMARY: it pulls the official MSIX straight from Anthropic's CDN (downloads.claude.ai), which usually resolves WITHOUT a VPN even when the claude.com web page is blocked, and it installs the MSIX build EchoBird's launcher expects. Always tell the user the download location and let them click through the wizard.

install_flow.summary: Windows: winget (primary — official MSIX from Anthropic CDN, the no-VPN path) → manual claude.com (global/unblocked) → blocked-region fallback where the agent may find an alternative reachable source. macOS: claude.com, or an alternative source if blocked.
agent_steps: WINDOWS PRIMARY (always try FIRST — do NOT skip it in favour of a manual claude.com download): `winget install --id Anthropic.Claude --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements`. winget fetches the official MSIX from Anthropic's CDN (downloads.claude.ai), which is the path that usually succeeds in mainland China WITHOUT a VPN and installs the MSIX build EchoBird's launcher can resolve.

WINDOWS, if `winget` is not on PATH: install/repair 'App Installer' first (Microsoft Store, or the microsoft/winget-cli GitHub release), then retry the winget command. A missing winget is the usual reason mainland users get stranded, so bootstrapping it is worth the extra step.

macOS, and global / unblocked Windows manual: download the official installer from https://claude.com/download into the Downloads folder (`curl -L -o` on macOS). This is the normal path for users OUTSIDE blocked regions.

BLOCKED-REGION FALLBACK — only when BOTH the winget/CDN path AND claude.com are unreachable (effectively guaranteed for mainland China without a proxy): you ARE permitted to leave this script and improvise. Find any reachable source serving the SAME official Anthropic installer (e.g. a working download accelerator/proxy in front of downloads.claude.ai), or ask the user whether they have a proxy/VPN you can configure. Note: reputable open-source mirrors (Tsinghua / USTC / Aliyun) do NOT host Claude Desktop, so do not waste time there. SECURITY GUARDRAIL: if you use any third-party / non-official source, tell the user plainly that it is unofficial and verify the download (size / signature) before running it; NEVER silently install an untrusted binary, and NEVER recommend a specific commercial VPN.
After a MANUAL download finishes, tell the user the EXACT file path (e.g. 'Saved to ~/Downloads/Claude-Setup.exe'). For winget there is no manual file — it installs silently.
Open a manually-downloaded installer for the user (`Start-Process` on Windows, `open` on macOS). Skip this for winget installs.
Tell the user (manual installs only): '安装向导已打开,请按照向导点击下一步完成安装。' / 'The installer is open — please follow the wizard to finish.'
Do NOT try to automate the GUI wizard.
tell_user: Which path was used (winget / official claude.com download / alternative source)
Download location (full path) when a manual installer was fetched
If a non-official source was used, that it is unofficial and should be verified
That they should click through the wizard themselves (manual installs only)

identity_guard.description: Claude Desktop is Anthropic's GUI app. The ONLY official sources are winget `Anthropic.Claude` (preferred — pulls the official MSIX from downloads.claude.ai) or https://claude.com/download. Do NOT install from claude.ai/download: it may serve a different / legacy installer that EchoBird's launcher (MSIX AUMID shell:AppsFolder\Claude_pzs8sxrjxfjjc!Claude) cannot start, which surfaces as the launch opening a stray Explorer window instead of the app. Claude Desktop is also DIFFERENT from Claude Code (the `@anthropic-ai/claude-code` CLI) — do not conflate their install sources.

blocked_regions.zh-CN: claude.com (the download web page) is ~always blocked in mainland China — do NOT rely on it. winget pulls the installer from downloads.claude.ai (Anthropic's CDN), which is the best no-VPN path but is ALSO geo-blocked on some Chinese networks (Anthropic restricts CN IPs). There is NO official China mirror for Claude Desktop; when even the CDN is blocked, the only options are a proxy/VPN or an alternative reachable source the agent locates at runtime.
